reviews.review_description: Basic zombie game decent environments fair graphics,  zombies only react if you shoot them.. Controls had small issue where it messed up it  if I tried to hold rifle with both hands. Doesnt seem to be difference between zombies abilities or gun types. with a few small tweaks this could be 4 stars.

Ok guns that run out if you do not get ammo to reload. 
It would be cool to get a jump action ,duck option,and unlimited ammo for the gins would just make this so great,let’s see what happens on update…..buy buy buy thumbs up .
